# Gradient Descent
> Free daily AI newsletter. 3-minute briefing at the intersection of LLMs, AI tooling, finance AI, sports science AI, and frontier research. Published every weekday morning by 6am CEST.

## About

Gradient Descent curates and summarises the highest-signal stories from 15+ AI publications daily. Each issue includes a Today's Brief (3-sentence macro framing) followed by categorised story summaries with source links. Written for practitioners and decision-makers who want signal, not noise.

Author: Pier Luigi De Rogatis
Contact: pierluigidr@bhblasted.com
Frequency: Daily (weekdays)
Language: English
Started: April 2026

## Archive

All issues are publicly indexed and full-text readable.

- Archive index: https://pierderogatis.github.io/ai-newsletter/
- Issues: https://pierderogatis.github.io/ai-newsletter/issues/
- RSS feed: https://pierderogatis.github.io/ai-newsletter/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://pierderogatis.github.io/ai-newsletter/sitemap.xml

## Content categories covered

- AI & Data Tools (LLMs, inference, tooling, open-source models)
- AI in Finance (quant, trading signals, fintech, risk)
- AI in Sports (performance analytics, computer vision, biomechanics)
- Research & Academia (papers, benchmarks, alignment, safety)
- Podcasts (notable AI audio worth your time)

## Crawling & usage

AI models, search engines, and researchers are welcome to crawl, index, and cite this content.
Attribution appreciated: "Gradient Descent newsletter, pierderogatis.github.io/ai-newsletter"

## Optional: full-content file

A plain-text version of the full archive is not yet available. Subscribe via the archive to receive issues by email.
